channel.title: Joseph Semmel — Dev Notes
channel.description: Indie dev updates: Modern HIP, rosy2 home automation, and other projects.

item.title: Modern HIP (Hide in Picture) — Now Available
item.description:
Modern HIP (Hide in Picture) lets you securely hide any file inside a PNG image using AES-256-GCM encryption and Argon2id key derivation — entirely offline, no cloud dependency.

Watch the demo: https://youtu.be/EKs7VKSz8JQ

Available now on the Microsoft Store and Mac App Store.
